headline: A Look Back at Property & Casualty Insurance Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: Allstate (NYSE:ALL) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Allstate (NYSE:ALL) and the best and worst performers in the property & casualty insurance industry.
